scripts.build:packages: bun run --filter @vui-rs/core build && bun run --filter @vui-rs/vue build && bun run --filter @vui-rs/ui build && bun run --filter @vui-rs/vite-plugin build && bun run --filter @vui-rs/rolldown build
scripts.build:examples: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter '@vui-rs/example-*' build
scripts.dev:form: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-form build && bun examples/form/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:textarea: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-textarea build && bun examples/textarea/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:markdown: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-markdown build && bun examples/markdown/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:diff: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-diff build && bun examples/diff/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:animation: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-animation build && bun examples/animation/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:theme-switch: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-theme-switch build && bun examples/theme-switch/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:images: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-images build && bun examples/images/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:selection: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-selection build && bun examples/selection/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:gallery: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-component-gallery build && bun examples/component-gallery/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:dialogs: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-dialogs build && bun examples/dialogs/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:command-palette: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-command-palette build && bun examples/command-palette/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:toast: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-toast build && bun examples/toast/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:autocomplete: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-autocomplete build && bun examples/autocomplete/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:autocomplete-popup: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-autocomplete-popup build && bun examples/autocomplete-popup/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:virtual-list: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @vui-rs/example-virtual-list build && bun examples/virtual-list/dist/app.js
scripts.test: bun run build:packages && cargo test -p vui-core && bun test packages/core/test packages/vue/test packages/vite-plugin/test packages/ui/test packages/rolldown/test && bun run scripts/abi-probe.ts
scripts.ci:publish: bun run build:native:all && bun run build:packages && bun run scripts/publish-packages.ts && changeset tag
